basic_details.job_title: NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 237 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL)
basic_details.post_name: Technician (Civil/Track, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom, Rolling Stock)
basic_details.application_mode: Online / As per prescribed application process
basic_details.short_information: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) has released a vacancy notification for Technician posts. The organisation invites applications from eligible Regular/Contractual employees working in Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways, Government-owned or operated Railways, Metro Railways and RRTS systems.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 07-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 05-08-2026

application_fee.details: For UR / EWS / OBC Candidates: Rs. 400/- (excluding transaction charges) For SC / ST / Women Candidates: No Fee

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation/SSLC + ITI / Diploma in relevant discipline

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Fill in all required details correctly.
Submit the application as per the prescribed procedure.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_high_speed_rail_corporation_lim: Technician (Civil/Track, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom, Rolling Stock)
Matriculation/SSLC + ITI / Diploma in relevant discipline
Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience in relevant field

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 07-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 05-08-2026

content_sections.heading: NHSRCL Technician Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: NHSRCL has announced vacancies for Technician posts across different technical domains. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates fulfilling the required educational qualification and experience criteria can apply for the Technician posts. The eligibility details are as follows: Technician Posts: Candidates must have Matriculation/SSLC along with ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT recognised institutions or Diploma in the relevant engineering discipline. Experience Requirement: Minimum 2 years of post-qualification experience in Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways, Government-owned Railways, Metro Railways or RRTS systems.

content_sections.heading: NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: For UR / EWS / OBC Candidates: Rs. 400/- (excluding transaction charges) For SC / ST / Women Candidates: No Fee

content_sections.heading: NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Computer Based Test (CBT) Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official NHSRCL website. Open the recruitment section. Read the official notification carefully. Download the application format/guidelines. Fill in all required details correctly. Attach necessary documents and certificates. Submit the application as per the prescribed procedure. Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name in NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name is Technician under various domains including Civil/Track, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom and Rolling Stock.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NHSRCL has announced a total of 231 Technician vacancies through Vacancy Notice Nos. 35/2026 to 49/2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for NHSRCL Technician posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should have Matriculation/SSLC along with ITI in the relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT recognised institutions or a Diploma in the relevant engineering discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Technician posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is work experience required for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of post-qualification experience in the relevant field within Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways, Government-owned Railways, Metro Railways or RRTS systems.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for NHSRCL Technician posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a pay scale of Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 1,10,000 under IDA Pay Scale NE-2 along with applicable benefits and allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: UR, EWS and OBC candidates have to pay Rs. 400/- (excluding transaction charges). SC, ST and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Computer Based Test (CBT), Document Verification and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job location for NHSRCL Technician posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates may be posted anywhere in the NHSRCL/MAHSR Project locations as per organisational requirements.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply for NHSRCL Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by following the application guidelines provided in the official notification and submitting the application in the prescribed format.
